text: Nohewo̱ le̱ nyekašea gbeyei! malè̱nye ke̱ nyebii le̱. Ni eše̱dše ame̱mĩ, ni eke̱ame̱ wie tšuidšũrõ nā.
translated: Look at the beauty of the world! Everything has its own beauty. In happiness and in sorrow, we are all in it together.

ref: and said, “Now I can believe you! My son Joseph must really be alive, and I will get to see him before I die.”
text: Ni Israel kē̱: Efá; mibi Iosef ye̱ dšeṅ lolo! Mate mayakwe̱ ehĩe däni magbo.
translated: It is Israel who says: Enough; the iniquities of Joseph are too numerous! I will not keep quiet about the troubles of my children.

text: Ni Lea kē̱: Midšō̱mo̱ mli nē̱! edšake̱ biyei badšō̱mi; ni ewole̱ Ašer.
translated: Leah said: What luck! I have borne a sixth son; and she named him Asher.
